MIDI CC Input Routing

Global
CC 7
0–127 → fx 0–N
0=Ext, 1–127
0–15 / 16=Omni

Resonance
Sw↓ most synths

Custom Firmware Generation

Build a self-contained card with your exact routing, settings, and samples baked in.

Current Configuration

Core Setup
Synth: Wavetable
Effect: Reverb
Audio Routing
Audio 1: L (Passthrough)
Audio 2: R (Passthrough)
Control Outputs
CV 1: Step Sequencer A
CV 2: Step Sequencer B
Gate 1: MIDI Gate
Gate 2: MIDI Gate
Manually load a .uf2 instead:
Drop flux.uf2 here or click to browse
Firmware will be merged with samples into one file

Samples

Drop audio files here or click to browse
MP3, WAV, AIFF, OGG supported. Auto-resampled to 22.05kHz Mu-Law.
